description_long: This object depicts an adult male pedestrian with a distorted and elongated upper body, particularly the arms and neck, which stretch unnaturally backward and outward. The figure is dressed in athletic wear, including a short-sleeve top, shorts, and knee-high socks, with cleated athletic shoes. The head is bald and the facial features are visible, but the neck is unnaturally extended. The arms are stretched into sharp, angular forms that do not resemble natural human anatomy, and the hands are not clearly defined. The lower body appears more proportionate, with visible muscular legs and standard athletic posture. The overall appearance is highly irregular, with significant mesh and texture artifacts, especially in the upper body and arms.
description: A distorted adult male figure in athletic wear with unnaturally elongated arms and neck, and a crouched lower body posture. The upper body is highly irregular, with sharp, stretched forms and visible mesh artifacts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and the extreme stretching of the arms and neck backward, with the legs in a crouched position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated neck and arm stretching backward, with the profile of the face and the left leg bent forward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the full extension of both arms, and the back of the legs, emphasizing the unnatural stretching.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the right profile of the head, the extended neck, and the right leg bent forward, with the arm stretching backward.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with short-sleeve top, shorts, and knee-high socks
attribute_posture: crouching with upper body and arms unnaturally stretched backward
